---
title: "DURIN Leaf:Stems Scan Calculations Vm"
author: "Sonya R. Geange, Gaëlle"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Calculate Leaf Area

```{r}
# Load libraries
devtools::install_github("richardjtelford/LeafArea")
library(LeafArea)
library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
##### Cuting the picture to have only the leaf

library(magick)

# 1. Tes dossiers
dossier_source <- "C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/scans/Vm_april2026_test"
dossier_dest   <- "C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/scans/Vm_april2026_test/leaf"

# Sécurité : Créer le dossier s'il n'existe pas
if (!dir.exists(dossier_dest)) dir.create(dossier_dest, recursive = TRUE)

# 2. Lister les fichiers .jpeg
liste_fichiers <- list.files(dossier_source, 
                             pattern = "(?i)\\.jpeg$", 
                             full.names = TRUE)

# 3. Traitement
lapply(liste_fichiers, function(chemin) {
  # Lecture
  img <- image_read(chemin)
  inf <- image_info(img)
  
  # Tes réglages de coupe
  coupe_haut <- 1550 
  coupe_bas  <- 1425
  
  # Calcul de la hauteur restante
  hauteur_finale <- inf$height - coupe_haut - coupe_bas
  
  # --- CORRECTION ICI ---
  # Syntaxe : Largeur x Hauteur + DécalageX + DécalageY
  # On commence à 0 en X et à 'coupe_haut' en Y
  geometrie <- paste0(inf$width, "x", hauteur_finale, "+0+", coupe_haut)
  
  # Rognage
  img_rognee <- image_crop(img, geometrie)
  
  # Sauvegarde
  nom_fichier <- basename(chemin)
  image_write(img_rognee, file.path(dossier_dest, nom_fichier))
})
```

```{r function_leaf_area}
#### Function to calculate leaf area 
loop.files <-  function(files) {
  file.copy(files, new.folder)
  if (grepl("-NA$", files)) {
    newfile <- basename(files)
    file.rename(paste0(new.folder, "/", newfile),
                paste0(new.folder,
                       "/", gsub("-NA$", "", newfile)))
  }
  print(files)
  area <-
    try(run.ij(
      path.imagej = "C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/ImageJ",
      set.directory = new.folder,
      distance.pixel = 236,
      known.distance = 2,
      log = TRUE,
      low.size = 0.01,
      trim.pixel = 0,
      trim.pixel.right = 250,
      trim.pixel.top = 0, # removing the enveloppe
      save.image = TRUE
    ))
  if (inherits(area, "try-error")) {
    return(data.frame(LeafArea = NA))
  }
  file.copy(dir(new.folder, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "\\.tif"),
            output.folder)
  Sys.sleep(0.1)
  if (any(!file.remove(dir(new.folder, full.names = TRUE))))
    stop()
  res <-
    data.frame(ID = names(unlist(area[[2]])), LeafArea = (unlist(area[[2]])))
  return(res)
}


# # If required
# # test run.ij on a subfolder.
# run.ij(
#   path.imagej = "C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/ImageJ",
#   set.directory = "C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/scans/Vm_april2026_test/leaf",
#   distance.pixel = 237,
#   known.distance = 2,
#   log = TRUE,
#   low.size = 0.05,
#   trim.pixel.right = 250,
#   trim.pixel.top = 0,
#   save.image = TRUE
# )
# ### /!\ some of the stems disappear when the image is in black and white
```

```{r function_leaf_area}
###########################################################################
#### Calculate leaf area for 2025-2026 DURIN Calluna Leaf Scans thermal tolerance
# Make a list of files, temporary folder and output folder
# Be sure to adjust the file path directory if required
# These need to be downloaded from the OSF account. 
# Note, each site has a folder and several subfolders.
# Because of how often errors occur, run each folder seperately
# Some images also required editing, i.e. painting overlapping leaves etc.
# A default address could be 'raw_data/leaf_scans/DURIN_leaf_scans/

# The folder with the scan images
list.of.files <- dir(path = paste0("C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/scans/Vm_april2026_test/feuille/"), pattern = "jpeg|jpg", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
# A default Temp folder that can be created as it's processing
new.folder <- "C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/scans/Vm_april2026_test/leaf/Temp"
# Where you want the thresholded images to be saved, and also the output csv
output.folder <- "C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/scans/Vm_april2026_test/leaf/output_leaf/" 

# Run function
# Returns a dataframe with each particle and it's area, using a concatenated ID
LeafArea.raw_total <- plyr::ldply(list.of.files, loop.files)


# calculate sums of the leaf area
leaf_area <- LeafArea.raw_total |>
  # Create and ID column based on the the first characters of the image file
  mutate(ID = substr(ID, 1, 7)) |>
  # Use the imageID to group the 'particles' leaves within
  group_by(ID) |>
  # Calculate per image, the number of particles and sum the areas of each
  dplyr::summarise(n = n(),
            leaf_area = sum(LeafArea))

# save data as csv
dim(leaf_area) # check you have the correct number of rows to match input images
write.csv(leaf_area, file = "C:/Users/poula/Documents/M2_PAMEQ/Stage M2/scans/Vm_april2026_test/leaf/output_leaf/DURIN_Vm_leaf_area_2026.csv")
```

## Calculate Young Stem Area

```{r}

```

## Calculate Old Stem Area

```{r}

```
